title: Assets, Media Admission, Fingerprints, CSS, and Integrity · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for assets, media admission, fingerprints, css, and integrity and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, filesystem, parser, template, validator, host, CDN, DNS, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded content-addressed asset manifest. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Admit assets by root, type, extension, signature where needed, size, dimensions, license, owner, and active-content policy.
Map source asset identity to collision-free public URL and output path without trusting basename or author traversal.
Hash canonical bytes with recorded algorithm and use the digest for cache-busting identity without embedding unstable metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Media Performance, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Media Performance precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Media Performance, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A quiz publishing team handles case 7133 during an accessibility-led community newsroom release. Build deterministic Python evidence to admit, fingerprint, rewrite, and reconcile bounded licensed assets; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets.

For Static-site publishing and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Media Performance, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: Converting every image to the newest format is automatically faster and accessible.

stimulus.title: Media Performance failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Converting every image to the newest format is automatically faster and accessible.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets.

options.text: Run the Media Performance boundary case for bounded content-addressed asset manifest, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

Accept the Media Performance result because visible bounded content-addressed asset manifest output is the highest authority. That claim fails the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary for Media Performance.

For diagnose the hidden failure, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof. This does not satisfy Media Performance for bounded content-addressed asset manifest.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Media Performance
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Media Performance: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz publishing team handles case 4800 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to admit, fingerprint, rewrite, and reconcile bounded licensed assets; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Media Performance.
steps.why: Retrieving Media Performance through the concrete bounded content-addressed asset manifest case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Media Performance, keep Media Performance connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets.
